title: Restore Customer and Driver trip history UI

requirements.text: Restore the 'My Trips' section in the Customer Dashboard. Display a list of trips where trip.customerPrincipal == caller, showing status (pending/assigned/confirmed/completed/cancelled), pickup/dropoff locations, vehicle type, fare, and timestamps. After a new booking is submitted, the trip must appear in the list immediately without a hard refresh.

quotes: Show list of trips created by caller (filter where trip.customerPrincipal == caller).
After booking, trip must appear immediately in My Trips without hard refresh.

acceptanceCriteria: Customer Dashboard displays a 'My Trips' section
Only trips where customerPrincipal matches the caller are shown
Each trip shows status, pickup/dropoff locations, vehicle type, fare, and timestamps
After booking a trip, it appears in My Trips immediately without a hard refresh
Status badge reflects current trip status (pending/assigned/confirmed/completed/cancelled)

requirements.text: Restore the 'My Trips' tab in the Driver Dashboard alongside the existing 'Available Trips' tab. 'My Trips' shows trips where trip.driverPrincipal == caller. 'Available Trips' shows only trips with no driver assigned. Remove the 'coming soon' placeholder text.

quotes: Add back 'My Trips' tab next to 'Available Trips'.
Driver My Trips shows trips where trip.driverPrincipal == caller.
Available Trips shows only trips with no driver assigned.

acceptanceCriteria: Driver Dashboard shows two tabs: 'Available Trips' and 'My Trips'
'My Trips' tab displays trips where driverPrincipal matches the caller
'Available Trips' tab displays only trips with no driver assigned
No 'coming soon' placeholder text is visible in the Driver Dashboard
Both tabs render trip details (locations, status, fare, timestamps)

constraints: Do not modify the backend schema or any Motoko data types
Do not change pricing logic or pricing configuration
Do not change driver profile persistence or the EditDriverProfileForm/EditDriverProfileModal components
Do not modify the Admin Trips page (AdminTripsTab.tsx)
Only reconnect the frontend UI to existing backend trip storage — no new backend methods
nonGoals: Adding new backend endpoints or modifying existing ones
Altering driver profile edit or save behavior
